phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Douro brochures are
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar as brochuras do Douro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR UHSH broo-SHOO-ruhsh DOO DOHW-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Regional materials are typically grouped by theme for quick visitor access.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Tram 1 Route info is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o mapa da linha do Elétrico 1?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW MAH-puh DUH LEE-nyuh DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo OOM?
phrases.cultural_note: Tram 1 is a historic route along the Douro; the leaflet includes a map and stops.

likely_response.local: O mapa está no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW MAH-puh ehs-TAH NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: The map is at the information desk.

responses.english: The map is at the information desk.
responses.phonetic: AW MAH-puh ehs-TAH NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: O mapa está no balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Livraria Lello info is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o posto de informações da Livraria Lello?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW POHSH-too DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH DUH leev-ruh-REEUH LEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: High-demand landmarks have dedicated flyers to streamline visitor planning.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Info Livraria Lello.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh EEN-foo leev-ruh-REEUH LEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for Info Livraria Lello.

responses.english: Follow the signs for Info Livraria Lello.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh EEN-foo leev-ruh-REEUH LEH-loo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Info Livraria Lello.

phrases.text_local: Pode me indicar um restaurante típico aqui perto?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih MIH een-dee-KAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo uh-KEE PEHR-too?

likely_response.local: Sim, temos recomendações de restaurantes típicos. Fale com o atendente de turismo no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEEN, TEH-moosh reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOHNYSH DIH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh TEE-pee-koosh. FAH-lih KOHM AW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, we have recommendations for typical restaurants. Speak with the tourism attendant at the information counter.

responses.english: Yes, we have recommendations for typical restaurants. Speak with the tourism attendant at the information counter.
responses.phonetic: SEEN, TEH-moosh reh-koo-mayng-duh-SOHNYSH DIH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh TEE-pee-koosh. FAH-lih KOHM AW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Sim, temos recomendações de restaurantes típicos. Fale com o atendente de turismo no balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Tram 1 Route info is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso obter informações sobre a Rota do Elétrico 1?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo awb-TEHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH RAW-tuh DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo OOM?
phrases.cultural_note: Transit routes are displayed on fixed panels to reduce repetitive staff queries.

likely_response.local: Pode pedir o folheto 'Rota do Elétrico 1' no balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih pih-DEER AW foo-LYEH-too'RAW-tuh DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo OOM' NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask for the 'Rota do Elétrico 1' brochure at the information counter.

responses.english: You can ask for the 'Rota do Elétrico 1' brochure at the information counter.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih pih-DEER AW foo-LYEH-too'RAW-tuh DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo OOM' NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Pode pedir o folheto 'Rota do Elétrico 1' no balcão de informações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Livraria Lello info is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso obter informações sobre a Livraria Lello?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo awb-TEHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH leev-ruh-REEUH LEH-loo?
phrases.cultural_note: Livraria Lello is a famous bookstore; visitors often need ticket and access info.

likely_response.local: Pode pedir ao atendente no balcão.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih pih-DEER OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask the attendant at the counter.

responses.english: You can ask the attendant at the counter.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih pih-DEER OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN.
responses.french: Pode pedir ao atendente no balcão.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Porto Card counter is
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde fica o balcão do Porto Card?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DOO POH-ruh-too KAH-ruhd?
phrases.cultural_note: The Porto Card offers discounts on attractions and public transport in Porto.

likely_response.translation_en: At the main counter, on the right.

responses.english: At the main counter, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Historic Center map is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o mapa do Centro Histórico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW MAH-puh DOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese tourism staff prioritize brief, precise directions to prevent counter congestion.

likely_response.translation_en: Where can I find the Historic Center map? / Ask the attendant for the map.

responses.english: Where can I find the Historic Center map? / Ask the attendant for the map.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Douro brochures are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as Brochuras do Douro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH broo-SHOO-ruhsh DOO DOHW-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Douro Valley is a major wine region; brochures are highly requested.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, they are at the counter.

responses.english: Good morning, they are at the counter.

phrases.text_local: Onde começa a Rota do Elétrico 1?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh AH RAW-tuh DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo OOM?

likely_response.local: Consulte o Mapa do Centro Histórico ou peça ajuda ao Atendente de turismo.
likely_response.pronunciation: koong-SOOW-tih AW MAH-puh DOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo OHW PEH-suh uh-ZHOO-duh OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Consult the Historic Center Map or ask the tourism attendant for help.

responses.english: Consult the Historic Center Map or ask the tourism attendant for help.
responses.phonetic: koong-SOOW-tih AW MAH-puh DOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo OHW PEH-suh uh-ZHOO-duh OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo.
responses.french: Consulte o Mapa do Centro Histórico ou peça ajuda ao Atendente de turismo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Rota do Elétrico 1 starts
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde começa a Rota do Elétrico 1?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh AH RAW-tuh DOO eh-LEHT-ree-koo OOM?
phrases.cultural_note: Rota do Elétrico 1 is a historic tram line that passes key sights in Porto.

likely_response.local: Na paragem em frente ao posto.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH puh-RAH-zhayng AYNG FRAYNG-tih OW POHSH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: At the stop in front of the info point.

responses.english: At the stop in front of the info point.
responses.phonetic: NUH puh-RAH-zhayng AYNG FRAYNG-tih OW POHSH-too.
responses.french: Na paragem em frente ao posto.
